untranslatable_reason: High Wave Candle and Bearish Engulfing Pattern detection requires multi-candle pattern recognition logic not expressible with single-bar indicators. Specifically: (1) identifying candle with 'wide range' at uptrend top requires contextual trend analysis, (2) Bearish Engulfing requires comparing current candle open/close to previous candle's range, (3) 'stomach low' concept is not a standard technical indicator. Approximated with range > ATR and bearish candle close < open, but this does not capture the full pattern intent.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Entry uses wide range (range > atr_14) and bearish candle (close < prev_open) as proxies for High Wave + Bearish Engulfing. Exit uses close > prev_high as reversal signal. Stop loss set to 2.43% per example. Pattern operates in TRENDING_UP regime. Author did not specify success rates or other parameters, so defaults applied.
